title: On A Noisy Polemic.
content:
Below thir stanes lie Jamie's banes:
            O Death, it's my opinion,
        Thou ne'er took such a blethrin' b--ch
            Into thy dark dominion!
meaning:
"On A Noisy Polemic." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
